children.heading: Assistance
children.label: 1 Assistance
children.text: The term “assistance” means the provision of, or the provision of access to, information (including communication contents, communications records, or other information relating to a customer or communication), facilities, or another form of assistance.

children.heading: Civil action
children.label: 2 Civil action
children.text: The term “civil action” includes a covered civil action.

children.label: A
children.text: the Select Committee on Intelligence of the Senate; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Contents
children.label: 4 Contents
children.text: The term “contents” has the meaning given that term in .section 1801(n) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: alleges that an electronic communication service provider furnished assistance to an element of the intelligence community; and

children.label: B
children.text: seeks monetary or other relief from the electronic communication service provider related to the provision of such assistance.

children.label: A
children.text: a telecommunications carrier, as that term is defined in ;section 153 of title 47

children.label: B
children.text: a provider of electronic communication service, as that term is defined in ;section 2510 of title 18

children.label: C
children.text: a provider of a remote computing service, as that term is defined in ;section 2711 of title 18

children.label: D
children.text: any other communication service provider who has access to wire or electronic communications either as such communications are transmitted or as such communications are stored;

children.label: i
children.text: a public accommodation facility, as that term is defined in ;section 1861(4) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: a dwelling, as that term is defined in ;section 3602 of title 42

children.label: iii
children.text: a community facility, as that term is defined in ; orsection 1592n of title 42

children.label: iv
children.text: a food service establishment, as that term is defined in ;section 1638 of title 7

children.label: F
children.text: a parent, subsidiary, affiliate, successor, or assignee of an entity described in subparagraph (A), (B), (C), or (D);

children.label: G
children.text: an officer, employee, custodian, or agent of an entity described in subparagraph (A), (B), (C), (D), (E), or (F).

children.heading: Intelligence community
children.label: 7 Intelligence community
children.text: The term “intelligence community” has the meaning given the term in .section 3003(4) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: an electronic communication service provider; or

children.label: i
children.text: an order of the court established under directing such assistance;section 1803(a) of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: a certification in writing under section 2511(2)(a)(ii)(B) or 2709(b) of title 18; or

children.label: iii
children.text: a directive under section 1802(a)(4), 1805b(e), as added by section 2 of the Protect America Act of 2007 (), or 1881a(i) of this title.Public Law 110–55

children.heading: State
children.label: 9 State
children.text: The term “State” means any State, political subdivision of a State, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the District of Columbia, and any territory or possession of the United States, and includes any officer, public utility commission, or other body authorized to regulate an electronic communication service provider.
